Bash(cd "C:/Users/TE/Documents/2026 Projects/WRL Data/wrl-lap-chart" && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add subscription-based access gating with free tier top-3 race access

Replace blanket premium flag gating with a tiered access system:
- Free users can access the 3 most recently published races \(>10hrs old\)
- Races created <10hrs ago show "available soon" messaging
- Pro/Team/Admin users get full library access
- Favorites restricted to paid tiers with client-side guard

Server: add canUserAccessRace\(\) service, update chart-data route to use
it, add 10-hour delay to getFreeAccessRaceIds, gate POST favorite route.

Client: enrich useChartData error state with status/code, split race list
into accessible/locked sections with upgrade banner, add distinct error
cards for AVAILABLE_SOON, INSUFFICIENT_TIER, and 401 states.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image

for name, src in [
    \("te-logo-black.png", "C:/Users/TE/Documents/2026 Projects/WRL Data/tedderengineering-site/assets/images/transparentimageblack.png"\),
    \("te-logo-white.png", "C:/Users/TE/Documents/2026 Projects/WRL Data/tedderengineering-site/assets/images/transparentimage.png"\),
]:
    img = Image.open\(src\)
    bbox = img.getbbox\(\)
    print\(f"{name}: original={img.size}, bbox={bbox}"\)
    trimmed = img.crop\(bbox\)
    # Add 5px transparent padding
    padded = Image.new\("RGBA", \(trimmed.width + 10, trimmed.height + 10\), \(0, 0, 0, 0\)\)
    padded.paste\(trimmed, \(5, 5\)\)
    out = f"C:/Users/TE/Documents/2026 Projects/WRL Data/wrl-lap-chart/client/public/{name}"
    padded.save\(out\)
    print\(f"  -> saved {padded.size} to {out}"\)
PYEOF)
